testcase.name: authenticate as admin
Dashboard page has no critical/serious a11y violations
Metrics page has no critical/serious a11y violations
Development page has no critical/serious a11y violations
Addons page has no critical/serious a11y violations
Workflows page has no critical/serious a11y violations
Backups page has no critical/serious a11y violations
Clone page has no critical/serious a11y violations
Logs page has no critical/serious a11y violations
Settings page has no critical/serious a11y violations
Dashboard widget on WP admin index has no a11y violations
Backups page tab switching maintains a11y
Metrics page with data loaded has no a11y violations
Addons › page renders without errors
Addons › Redis addon toggle is present
Addons › Solr addon toggle is present
Addons › Elasticsearch shows Coming Soon badge
Addons › Redis status reflects live environment state
Addons › save button is present and enabled
ARIA — Dashboard › page has a meaningful document title
ARIA — Dashboard › plugin header has an img with alt text
ARIA — Dashboard › main heading is present and non-empty
ARIA — Dashboard › environment card has accessible structure
ARIA — Modals › backup confirmation modal has correct ARIA structure
ARIA — Modals › progress modal heading exists in DOM
ARIA — Live regions › log contents region is reachable and labeled
ARIA — Live regions › metrics summary stats have accessible labels
ARIA — Forms › settings form inputs have associated labels
ARIA — Forms › backup form selects have visible labels
ARIA — Forms › addons form checkboxes have associated labels
ARIA — Landmark regions › plugin pages use heading hierarchy correctly
ARIA — Landmark regions › tables have captions or headers
Backups — create and download › backup type selector has all expected options
Backups — create and download › retention period field accepts a value
Backups — create and download › create database backup and verify it appears in the list
Backups — create and download › download button generates a signed URL
Backups › page renders with tabbed environment UI
Backups › default tab is visible and active
Backups › tab switching shows the correct panel
Backups › backup creation form renders
Backups › existing backups section loads
Clone › page renders without errors
Clone › source environment selector is present
Clone › target environment selector is present
Clone › database and files checkboxes are present
Clone › clone button is present
Connection Mode Toggle › toggle is present and shows current mode
Connection Mode Toggle › toggling mode updates the badge
Dashboard › renders the Pantheon branded header
Dashboard › shows the 50/50 two-column layout
Dashboard › environment card shows Pantheon site info
Dashboard › API endpoint testing table renders
Dashboard › inline site label editing is accessible
Dashboard › connection mode toggle is present with a valid mode
WP Admin Dashboard Widget › widget renders on wp-admin index
WP Admin Dashboard Widget › widget chart renders after data loads
WP Admin Dashboard Widget › widget links to Metrics page
Development › page renders without errors
Development › upstream updates section renders
Development › recent commits card renders
Development › environments card renders with environment list
Development › refresh button on recent commits is clickable
Development › code deployment section renders
Error States — API failure handling › metrics page shows error when API call fails
Error States — API failure handling › dashboard widget shows error when metrics API fails
Error States — API failure handling › logs page shows error when fetch fails
Error States — API failure handling › connection mode toggle shows error when API fails
Error States — AJAX network failure › backup creation handles network failure gracefully
Inline Site Label Editing › can open the inline editor
Inline Site Label Editing › cancel restores the original label
Inline Site Label Editing › saves a new label and displays it
Inline Site Label Editing › Enter key submits the inline label form
Inline Organization Selector › org edit button opens the selector
Inline Organization Selector › org cancel hides the selector
Keyboard — Dashboard › all interactive elements in .wrap are reachable via Tab
Keyboard — Dashboard › inline site label edit is keyboard operable
Keyboard — Dashboard › connection mode toggle responds to Enter
Keyboard — Backups tabs › environment tabs are keyboard navigable
Keyboard — Backups tabs › backup set toggle is keyboard operable
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › keyboard.spec.js:104:3 › Keyboard — Backups tabs › backup set toggle is keyboard operable Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: locator('.ash-nazg-backup-elements-table').first() Expected: visible Received: hidden Timeout: 3000ms Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 3000ms - waiting for locator('.ash-nazg-backup-elements-table').first() 7 × locator resolved to …
- unexpected value "hidden" 109 | await page.keyboard.press('Space'); 110 | const table = page.locator('.ash-nazg-backup-elements-table').first(); > 111 | await expect(table).toBeVisible({ timeout: 3_000 }); | ^ 112 | }); 113 | }); 114 | at /home/runner/work/ash-nazg/ash-nazg/tests/e2e/keyboard.spec.js:111:25 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/keyboard-Keyboard-—-Backup-b07ea-toggle-is-keyboard-operable-chromium/test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/keyboard-Keyboard-—-Backup-b07ea-toggle-is-keyboard-operable-chromium/video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ../../test-results/keyboard-Keyboard-—-Backup-b07ea-toggle-is-keyboard-operable-chromium/error-context.md attachment #4: trace (application/zip) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/keyboard-Keyboard-—-Backup-b07ea-toggle-is-keyboard-operable-chromium/trace.zip Usage: npx playwright show-trace ../../test-results/keyboard-Keyboard-—-Backup-b07ea-toggle-is-keyboard-operable-chromium/trace.zip ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Retry #1 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: locator('.ash-nazg-backup-elements-table').first() Expected: visible Received: hidden Timeout: 3000ms Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 3000ms - waiting for locator('.ash-nazg-backup-elements-table').first() 7 × locator resolved to …
- unexpected value "hidden" 109 | await page.keyboard.press('Space'); 110 | const table = page.locator('.ash-nazg-backup-elements-table').first(); > 111 | await expect(table).toBeVisible({ timeout: 3_000 }); | ^ 112 | }); 113 | }); 114 | at /home/runner/work/ash-nazg/ash-nazg/tests/e2e/keyboard.spec.js:111:25 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/keyboard-Keyboard-—-Backup-b07ea-toggle-is-keyboard-operable-chromium-retry1/test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/keyboard-Keyboard-—-Backup-b07ea-toggle-is-keyboard-operable-chromium-retry1/video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ../../test-results/keyboard-Keyboard-—-Backup-b07ea-toggle-is-keyboard-operable-chromium-retry1/error-context.md attachment #4: trace (application/zip) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/keyboard-Keyboard-—-Backup-b07ea-toggle-is-keyboard-operable-chromium-retry1/trace.zip Usage: npx playwright show-trace ../../test-results/keyboard-Keyboard-—-Backup-b07ea-toggle-is-keyboard-operable-chromium-retry1/trace.zip ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: Keyboard — Metrics filters › environment and duration selects are keyboard operable
Keyboard — Modal focus trapping › confirmation modal traps focus when open
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › keyboard.spec.js:139:3 › Keyboard — Modal focus trapping › confirmation modal traps focus when open
Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality
Expected: true Received: false
152 | document.activeElement === confirm; 153 | }); > 154 | expect(focusedInModal).toBe(true); | ^ 155 | 156 | // Cancel the modal. 157 | await modal.locator('button').filter({ hasText: 'Cancel' }).click(); at /home/runner/work/ash-nazg/ash-nazg/tests/e2e/keyboard.spec.js:154:28

npx playwright show-trace ../../test-results/keyboard-Keyboard-—-Modal--22ca9-modal-traps-focus-when-open-chromium/trace.zip

Expected: true Received: false

testcase.name: Keyboard — Addons toggles › Redis and Solr checkboxes are keyboard operable
Keyboard — Development page › all deploy buttons are keyboard reachable
Logs › page renders without errors
Logs › Fetch Logs button is present and clickable
Logs › Clear Logs button is present
Logs › fetching logs loads content
Metrics — All time periods load data › loads data for 7 days
Metrics — All time periods load data › loads data for 28 days
Metrics — All time periods load data › loads data for 12 weeks
Metrics — All time periods load data › loads data for 12 months
Metrics — Environment switching › switching environment loads data for that environment
Metrics — Refresh clears cache › Refresh button clears cache and reloads
Metrics — Chart visibility via Screen Options › hidden chart canvas is absent from the DOM
Metrics › page renders summary statistics above filters
Metrics › Load Metrics button fetches real API data
Metrics › environment selector contains expected options
Metrics › duration selector has all time period options
Metrics › summary stats update after data loads
Metrics › filter persistence: selections survive page reload
Screen Options — Dashboard endpoint groups › can open Screen Options panel
Screen Options — Dashboard endpoint groups › master toggle hides all endpoint groups
Screen Options — Development sections › can hide and restore Environments card
Screen Options — Backups age filter › age filter options are present
Screen Options — Backups age filter › selecting 7-day filter and applying restricts backup list
Screen Options — Metrics charts › hiding all charts also hides the filters section
Settings › settings page renders without errors
Settings › machine token section is present
Settings › session token section renders
Settings › per-user token documentation is visible
Workflows › page renders without errors
Workflows › available workflows section renders
Workflows › Object Cache Pro workflow card is present
Workflows › trigger workflow button is present
